detectors.description:
Reentrancy in LiveseyChad._transfer(address,address,uint256) (LiveseyChad.sol#651-775):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (LiveseyChad.sol#715)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (LiveseyChad.sol#789-801)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (LiveseyChad.sol#721)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount.mul(3).div(5)) (LiveseyChad.sol#809)
		- _developmentAddress.transfer(amount.mul(2).div(5)) (LiveseyChad.sol#811)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (LiveseyChad.sol#773)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (LiveseyChad.sol#937)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (LiveseyChad.sol#917)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (LiveseyChad.sol#919)
	LiveseyChad._rOwned (LiveseyChad.sol#327) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- LiveseyChad._takeTeam(uint256) (LiveseyChad.sol#931-939)
	- LiveseyChad._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (LiveseyChad.sol#891-927)
	- LiveseyChad.balanceOf(address) (LiveseyChad.sol#467-471)
	- LiveseyChad.constructor() (LiveseyChad.sol#409-439)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (LiveseyChad.sol#773)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (LiveseyChad.sol#945)
	LiveseyChad._rTotal (LiveseyChad.sol#339) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- LiveseyChad._getCurrentSupply() (LiveseyChad.sol#1087-1097)
	- LiveseyChad._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (LiveseyChad.sol#943-949)
	- LiveseyChad.constructor() (LiveseyChad.sol#409-439)
	- LiveseyChad.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (LiveseyChad.sol#573-595)

		- _developmentAddress.transfer(amount.mul(2).div(5)) (LiveseyChad.sol#811)

		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (LiveseyChad.sol#919)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (LiveseyChad.sol#773)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (LiveseyChad.sol#945)
	- _redisFee = _redisFeeOnBuy (LiveseyChad.sol#749)
	- _redisFee = _redisFeeOnSell (LiveseyChad.sol#761)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (LiveseyChad.sol#773)
		- _redisFee = _previousredisFee (LiveseyChad.sol#621)
		- _redisFee = 0 (LiveseyChad.sol#611)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (LiveseyChad.sol#773)
		- _tFeeTotal = _tFeeTotal.add(tFee) (LiveseyChad.sol#947)
	- _taxFee = _taxFeeOnBuy (LiveseyChad.sol#751)
	- _taxFee = _taxFeeOnSell (LiveseyChad.sol#763)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (LiveseyChad.sol#773)
		- _taxFee = _previoustaxFee (LiveseyChad.sol#623)
		- _taxFee = 0 (LiveseyChad.sol#613)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Transfer(sender,recipient,tTransferAmount) (LiveseyChad.sol#925)
		- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (LiveseyChad.sol#773)
